tcmalloc.formattedString:
------------------------------------------------
MALLOC:       14159336 (   13.5 MiB) Bytes in use by application
MALLOC: +      5472256 (    5.2 MiB) Bytes in page heap freelist
MALLOC: +       394848 (    0.4 MiB) Bytes in central cache freelist
MALLOC: +      2390336 (    2.3 MiB) Bytes in transfer cache freelist
MALLOC: +      1368696 (    1.3 MiB) Bytes in thread cache freelists
MALLOC: +      2752512 (    2.6 MiB) Bytes in malloc metadata
MALLOC:   ------------
MALLOC: =     26537984 (   25.3 MiB) Actual memory used (physical + swap)
MALLOC: +            0 (    0.0 MiB) Bytes released to OS (aka unmapped)
MALLOC:   ------------
MALLOC: =     26537984 (   25.3 MiB) Virtual address space used
MALLOC:
MALLOC:           1030              Spans in use
MALLOC:             41              Thread heaps in use
MALLOC:           4096              Tcmalloc page size
------------------------------------------------
Call ReleaseFreeMemory() to release freelist memory to the OS (via madvise()).
Bytes released to the OS take up virtual address space but no physical memory.
